allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "pkill -f mihomo; sleep 1; nohup mihomo -d ~/.config/mihomo > /tmp/mihomo.log 2>&1 & sleep 2; curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9097/proxies | head -5")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ps aux | grep -i mihomo | grep -v grep")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "cat /tmp/mihomo.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'no log'; echo '---'; which mihomo; ls -la ~/.config/mihomo/config.yaml")

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9097/proxies 2>/dev/null | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('proxies',{}\).get\('SG-住宅IP',{}\)\)\\" 2>/dev/null || echo 'API不可访问'")

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "curl -s http://127.0.0.1:9097/proxies 2>/dev/null | python3 -c \\"import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); p=d.get\('proxies',{}\).get\('SG-住宅IP',{}\); print\(f'server: {p.get\(\\"server\\"\)}:{p.get\(\\"port\\"\)}'\)\\" 2>/dev/null || echo '启动失败'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ps aux | grep mihomo | grep -v grep")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "pkill -9 mihomo; sudo ~/.local/bin/mihomo -d ~/.config/mihomo 2>&1 | head -20 &")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "id; sudo -n true 2>&1 && echo 'sudo ok' || echo 'no sudo'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "pkill mihomo 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; sudo nohup ~/.local/bin/mihomo -d ~/.config/mihomo > /tmp/mihomo.log 2>&1 &")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "pgrep -a mihomo; echo '---'; sudo tail -20 /tmp/mihomo.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'no log'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "pgrep -a mihomo; sudo cat /var/log/mihomo.log 2>/dev/null | tail -15 || echo 'checking tmp'; sudo ls /tmp/*.log 2>/dev/null | grep mihomo")
